FSM_CLASSES

Table for storing FSM classes.

Columns
fcl_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key.

fcl_pti_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Translatable item, reference to PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM.

fcl_type_name (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Name of the implementing SQL object type. Used to derive class ownership from ALL_TYPES.

fcl_active (according to `pit_util.flag_type`)

Flag indicating whether the class is currently used.

Dependencies
fcl_pti_id, fcl_id

references <PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM> (pti_uid, pti_upmg)
